docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2017 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-10-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PRIOR TO THE CALLING OF THE CASE PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $300.00 EVERY WEEK UNTIL THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT PLUS $135.00 FEES RELATED TO ORDER OF EXAMIANTION IS PAID IN FULL. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL CONTINUED EVERY MONTH UNTIL THE BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. JUDGMENT CREDITOR JOSEPH NDJOCK IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR FERDINAND NDEDI IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION BENCH WARRANT ISSUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-11-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NDJOCK, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY $2,114.20 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,254.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SIGNED AND SEALED (ORIGINAL) BENCH WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDER AS TO DEFENDANT FERDINAND NDEDI. ORIGINAL AND ONE COPY FORWARDED TO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NDJOCK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY

FILED AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE PER SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPT., "THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE TIME EXPIRED. BENCH WARRANT RETURNED BY LASO. NOT ENOUGH TIME FOR SERVICE." FILED BY PLAINTIFF NDJOCK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,304.15 FILED BY NDJOCK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION BY PLAINTIFF REQUESTING THAT EXPIRED BENCH WARRANT (SIGNED ON 10/20/17) BE RE-ISSUED WITH A NEW EXPIRATION DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NDJOCK, JOSEPH
FILED AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE RE AMENDED WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF NDJOCK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION BENCH LETTER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: OEX CONTINUED TO AUG-10-2017 AT 11:00AM IN DEPT. 506. BENCH LETTER ISSUED.
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 (FOR RE-ISSUANCE OF PRIOR EXPIRED WARRANT) AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 (FOR RE-ISSUANCE OF PRIOR EXPIRED WARRANT) AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH NDJOCK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FERDINAND NDEDI DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2017 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-10-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506, BENCH LETTER ISSUED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR HAS NOT RECEIVED PAYMENTS FROM DEBTOR AS PREVIOUSLY AGREED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR JOSEPH NDJOCK IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR FERDINAND NDEDI IS NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RE: SMALL CLIAMS ORDER BENCH LETTER: RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD.
CIVIL BENCH WARRANT ISSUED ON 01/10/18 RETURNED TO THE COURT AS WARRANT EXJPIRED 03/13/18. AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY HEARING SET FOR APR-24-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO FERDINAND NDEDI, 400 CONTINENTAL BL, EL SEGUNDO CA
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAR-17-2017 FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-24-2017 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-08-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR JOSEPH NDJOCK IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2017; JUDGMENT DEBTOR FERDINAND NDEDI FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. JUDGMENT CREDITOR JOSEPH NDJOCK IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR FERDINAND NDEDI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED 10/23/17 RETURNED UNSERVED - WARRANT EXPIRED ON 12/20/17. FILED BY PLAINTIFF NDJOCK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT NDEDI, FERDINAND DBA GLOBAL UNIT ONE SECURITY
